diagrams.title: Standard Linear Transformations in R²
diagrams.description: Visual grid showing identity, rotation, scaling, shear, and reflection transformations
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how each transformation affects the plane geometry

diagrams.title: Rotation by θ
diagrams.description: Counterclockwise rotation showing basis vectors e₁ and e₂ rotating to new positions
diagrams.purpose: Understand rotation as matrix transformation of basis vectors

diagrams.title: Determinant as Area Scaling
diagrams.description: Unit square transformed into parallelogram, showing area = |det|
diagrams.purpose: Visualize geometric meaning of determinant as area factor

diagrams.title: Shear Transformation
diagrams.description: Horizontal shear showing vertical lines tilting while maintaining y-coordinate
diagrams.purpose: Understand shear as sliding effect preserving horizontal lines
